title: Widdop & Co Childrens Craft DIY Wooden Christmas Tree
features: Get crafty this Christmas with this DIY wooden Christmas Tree model.
Colour the tree sections in and use the thread to create a colourful chain of baubles
Set includes: 1 x red thread - Vibrant coloured bauble beads - 2 x wooden Christmas tree panels - 5 x wooden gifts - 1 x instructions
The perfect stocking filler gift for a child +3 years
description: Get crafty this Christmas with this DIY wooden Christmas Tree model. From the North Pole Novelties Co. by Santa's Workshop - the one stop shop for Christmas cheer! Colour the tree sections in and use the thread to create a colourful chain of baubles. Scatter the wooden gift under the tree. Rekindle childhood memories, wrap up in festive warmth and take a stroll down memory lane to find a treasure trove of stylishly reimagined Christmas stories and characters. North Pole Novelties Co. provides cheerful festive décor, partyware, confectionary and gifts for people of all ages.
